symptom: ACI container group stuck in Created status for a long time. Image pull takes excessively long (e.g. 18+ minutes).
rootCause: ACI does not permanently cache images. Large uncached images must be fully pulled from the registry on each deployment.
solution: Run az container show to check events timeline. If pull time is long due to large image size, this is expected. Recommend: 1) Use smaller images, 2) Check cached images list, 3) Use multi-stage builds.
sourceRef: Supportability/AzureContainers/Containers Wiki:/Azure Kubernetes Service Wiki/ACI/TSG/ACI Long Image Pull times

symptom: ACI container group restarts intermittently without any error in container logs or clear indication of cause.
rootCause: Platform events such as REPAIRDEPLOYMENTS trigger automatic restarts for reliability and maintenance.
solution: Use Kusto queries: 1) Query accprod.SubscriptionDeployments filter TaskName contains start, 2) Get correlationId and query HttpIncomingRequests for REPAIRDEPLOYMENTS. If confirmed as platform event, this is expected behavior.
sourceRef: Supportability/AzureContainers/Containers Wiki:/Azure Kubernetes Service Wiki/ACI/TSG/Container Group restart due to Platform events

symptom: ACI deployment fails with error ContainerGroupQuotaReached.
rootCause: Subscription has hit the ACI container group quota limit for the target region.
solution: Request a quota increase through Azure portal support request. Check current quota via Kusto query against ACCProd SubscriptionPolicy table.

symptom: ACI deployment fails with InvalidImageRegistryIdentity: The given identity is either missing or lacking ACR permission.
rootCause: The Managed Identity specified in imageRegistryCredentials is not assigned to the container group or lacks AcrPull role on the ACR.
solution: Verify: 1) Identity is in ContainerGroupIdentity, 2) Identity has AcrPull role on target ACR, 3) Server field matches ACR login server, 4) Using API version >= 2021-07-01.

symptom: ACI image pull from ACR fails when using Managed Identity authentication. Errors include InvalidImageRegistryCredentialType, AmbiguousImageRegistryCredentialType, or InvalidImageRegistryIdentity.
rootCause: Multiple causes: wrong API version (<2021-07-01), VNET-injected CG limitations, malformed definition, or ACR private DNS zone issues.
solution: Checklist: 1) API version >= 2021-07-01, 2) No VNET-injected CGs or Windows Server 2016, 3) Validate definition has ImageRegistryCredential (server+identity) and ContainerGroupIdentity, 4) Ensure AcrPull RBAC on ACR.
sourceRef: Supportability/AzureContainers/Containers Wiki:/Azure Kubernetes Service Wiki/ACI/TSG/Managed Identity Auth Image Pulls
